return b end,function(E,N)local B=y(N)local b=function(b,s,q,k,f)return A(E,{b;s,q;k,f},N,B)end return b end return(W(8450774-(-378224),{}))(B(f))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[N(74915+-32663)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
